theme_and_archetype.archetype: Organic & Earthy (1) blended with Swiss & High-Contrast (4)
theme_and_archetype.description: A lightweight ERP that feels like a modern operational control room but retains the warmth of a Punjabi Dhaba. It bridges high-density data display with approachable, tactile interactions for non-tech-savvy staff.

hierarchy.kpi_value: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-orange-600 font-poppins
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-semibold tracking-widest uppercase text-slate-500

rules: Never use pure black for text. Use slate-900 or slate-800.
Data tables must use tabular-nums utility for aligned digits.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Mobile-first, bottom-nav centric for operators. Desktop sidebar for admin.
rules: Bottom padding on mobile must account for the fixed bottom navigation (pb-24).
Containers with borders must use internal padding.
Use optical alignment for icons within buttons.

buttons.primary: bg-orange-600 text-white hover:bg-orange-700 rounded-full font-medium transition-all shadow-sm shadow-orange-600/20 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-amber-100 text-amber-900 hover:bg-amber-200 rounded-full font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.outline: border border-orange-200 text-orange-700 hover:bg-orange-50 rounded-full font-medium transition-all

forms.input: rounded-lg border-orange-900/15 focus:border-orange-600 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-orange-600/50 bg-white shadow-sm h-12 text-base
forms.label: text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1.5 block

navigation.mobile_bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 w-full bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-orange-900/10 h-16 flex items-center justify-around px-2 z-50
navigation.desktop_sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen w-64 bg-[#2D1606] text-white p-4 flex flex-col gap-2 z-50 transition-transform

components.toast: Use Sonner with rich colors enabled for clear success/error states.

animations.staggered_list: Framer motion staggered children for table rows and stock cards.
rules: Keep animations fast (under 300ms) to not slow down operations.
Use tactile active states (active:scale-95) for all primary buttons.

login_bg.description: High-end cinematic photo of a modern Dhaba. Use for login background and Display Mode holding screen.

texture_bg.description: Subtle sandstone texture for dashboard background.

empty_state_spices.description: Rich Indian spices. Use for empty states (e.g. no inventory found, no purchases today).

dashboard_summary.layout: Bento Grid (Control Room Mode). Dense data.
dashboard_summary.elements: Top row KPIs (Today's Sales, Purchases, Alerts), Recharts Line chart for Sales Trend, Donut chart for Menu Mix.

live_stock.elements: Color-coded stock cards. Green = Safe, Yellow = Low, Red = Out. Fast search bar at top.

data_entry_forms.layout: Vertical stacked fields for mobile ease. Running totals sticky at the bottom or top.
data_entry_forms.elements: Multi-item dynamic list entry for Usage and Purchases. Auto-calculating ₹ totals.

display_mode.elements: Darker background, large text, rotating views of Live Stock and Today's Sales.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case and role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install lucide-react and configure Tailwind with the provided color hex codes.
Use Poppins for headings and Inter for body text via Google Fonts.
Implement a responsive layout: Bottom navigation bar for mobile (<768px), and fixed left sidebar for desktop.
Set the app background to #FFF8F0. Add subtle shadow to white cards.
Ensure all data entries for currency prefix with '₹'.
Use color-coded cards for Live Stock as defined in the components section.
Ensure Shadcn components are heavily customized: remove vercel-like sharp/small radii. Use rounded-2xl for cards and rounded-full for primary buttons.
